text:
Luxury Sunflower Resin Table Making 🌻 | Satisfying Epoxy Art Process | From Garage to Luxury Hom . Watch the complete process of creating a luxury sunflower resin table — from arranging real flowers inside a large mold to pouring epoxy resin, polishing, and finally placing the finished artwork inside a beautiful luxury home.

This satisfying resin art video shows the full transformation step by step inside a garage workshop, turning simple sunflowers into a stunning handmade furniture piece.

Perfect for fans of epoxy resin art, satisfying craft videos, and luxury home decor designs.

🌻 Process Includes:
• Flower arrangement in table-size mold
• Epoxy resin pouring
• Resin curing and demolding
• Professional polishing
• Final luxury interior placement

If you enjoy satisfying art and resin creations, don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more creative projects!

#resinart #epoxyresin #resintable #satisfyingvideo #luxurydecor

2026 is calling… and she’s layered, bold, and a little nostalgic 👀✨
Here are the decor moves I think we’re about to see everywhere this year:

• Plate walls (collected > perfect)
• Fabric behind glass-front cabinets (goodbye plain white backing)
• Statement furniture that actually says something
• Contrast trim instead of matching everything
• Wallpaper making a full comeback
• Hanging tapestries & rugs as art
• Monogramming (personalized is luxury)
• Cut-outs in cabinetry for that custom feel
We’re leaning into character, craftsmanship, and details that feel curated — not cookie cutter.

Which one are you adding to your home first? 👇 #interiordesign #homedecortrends #homedecorideas #walldecor #decortrends

text:
The modern vintage aesthetic 😍
Here's how I achieve this look...
Add pops of colour here and there you can do this with paint, furniture, cushions or art, I prefer rich sumptuous tones like red, burgundy and orange. 
Buy second hand furniture and accessories, adding vintage pieces to each room will ground the space, add instant character, charm and warmth and make your space unique to you. It also helps introduce a familiar thread through out the home (the red thread) 
Mix the old styles with the new like an old characterful dining table with modern chairs
Mix your fabrics, textures, and patterns velvet for me always helps create a cosy feel, add in florals or a classic pinstripe if you're not a fan of busy patterns 
✨ And the number one tip... stay true to your style 😍👌
Happy Sunday lovelies ❤️😘

#victorianhouse #periodproperty #vintagedecor house tour cosy home decor

text:
Living room details.🥹🤎 These are the questions I get on the daily so I thought I would share a video with all the details of my living room!  I feel like  It took me forever to get his room complete! A home takes time is so true!🤎🤎 This is now one of my favorite rooms in the house. It feels warm and cozy and also bright and airy at the same time.
Wall color: blank canvas by Behr! This color is such a nice creamy white!
Couch: my couch is from love sac! It’s the color tanned combed chenille! It’s a really nice tan/cream color! I wanted light furniture but not solid white bc I wanted it cozy and I’m too afraid of the upkeep with kids lol 
Fireplace stone: El Dorado Casablanca rough cut.
Coffee table: pure salt interiors. I love this table. I love the large size and it’s such a pretty wood tone. It paired perfectly with my other furniture!
Rug: Joon Loloi Cade rug. I love this rug bc it’s not too dark and not too light. I also like the warm brown tones it has!! It holds up great to traffic, kids, and pets lol 
#livingroom #cozyhome #homedecor #homeinspo #livingroomdecor
